description: Create a three-column content slide on the race to Industry 4.0/Industrial Internet, with a starting-point ecosystem panel, a central bullet-list panel for the race, and an end-state panel showing competition/co-opetition/collaboration options.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: Global run for leading positions in Industry 4.0/Industrial Internet – Competition, co-opetition or collaboration?

left.title: Starting point
left.body: IT/Internet players: Apple, Intel, Google, Microsoft, Oracle, Cisco. Industry players: Toyota, Boeing, Siemens, United Technologies, GE, Volkswagen.

items.text: Race between IT/Internet companies and industrial players for leading positions in Industry 4.0/Industrial Internet
Starting from different positions and capabilities
Convergence toward a shared Industry 4.0 / Industrial Internet space
